findings.title: Repeated Failed Login Attempts
findings.description: Multiple failed password attempts were observed, indicating possible credential guessing.
findings.recommendation: Review source IPs for repeated failures and consider rate-limiting or lockout policies.

findings.title: Open Port 21/tcp (ftp)
findings.recommendation: FTP is insecure. Use SFTP or SCP instead.

findings.title: Open Port 22/tcp (ssh)
findings.recommendation: Restrict SSH access to authorized networks. Use key-based authentication.

findings.title: Open Port 23/tcp (telnet)
findings.recommendation: Telnet is deprecated. Replace with SSH.

findings.title: Open Port 25/tcp (smtp)
findings.recommendation: Verify SMTP relay restrictions. Enable TLS.

findings.title: Open Port 53/tcp (domain)
findings.recommendation: Review necessity of open port 53. Close if not required.

findings.title: Open Port 80/tcp (http)
findings.recommendation: Ensure HTTPS is available. Redirect HTTP to HTTPS.

findings.title: Open Port 111/tcp (rpcbind)
findings.recommendation: Review necessity of open port 111. Close if not required.

findings.title: Open Port 139/tcp (netbios-ssn)
findings.recommendation: Review necessity of open port 139. Close if not required.

findings.title: Open Port 2121/tcp (ftp)
findings.recommendation: FTP is insecure. Use SFTP or SCP instead.

findings.title: Open Port 3306/tcp (mysql)
findings.recommendation: Move to private network. Disable remote root.

findings.title: Open Port 5432/tcp (postgresql)
findings.recommendation: Review necessity of open port 5432. Close if not required.

findings.title: Open Port 5900/tcp (vnc)
findings.recommendation: Review necessity of open port 5900. Close if not required.

users.title: User Has No MFA Method Registered
users.confidence_rationale: Field explicitly null in export. Absence confirmed. Role data unavailable — confidence reduced.

mitre.tactic: Credential Access, Defense Evasion, Persistence

users.recommendation: Enforce MFA registration via Conditional Access or Authentication Strength policies. Require phishing-resistant methods where possible.

users.title: Active Account With No Recorded Sign-In Activity
users.confidence_rationale: Field explicitly null in export. Absence confirmed.

mitre.tactic: Defense Evasion, Persistence, Privilege Escalation, Initial Access

users.recommendation: Investigate accounts with no sign-in history. Disable or remove accounts that are no longer needed.

users.title: Guest / External User Account Detected
users.confidence_rationale: Standard marker for external/guest identity. Deterministic.

mitre.tactic: Defense Evasion, Persistence, Privilege Escalation, Initial Access

users.recommendation: Review guest account necessity. Apply Conditional Access policies and restrict guest permissions via External Collaboration Settings.
